title: Kapenguria Cold Snap
lead: A cold snap has hit Kapenguria with a Z-Score of -1.50. This unusual event has a score of 5.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kapenguria are characterized by a significant drop in temperature. 
 The city is experiencing a cold snap, with a Z-Score of -1.50, indicating a deviation from the average temperature. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, with no wind, and the HDD is at 3.0 GG.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely for further updates and potential impacts.
